MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2004 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Kerry M. Gough, Esq. for Petitioner: Thomas Burgess present as guardian ad litem for Beatrice Burgess, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Compromise: $17,000.00
Total allowance for fees and expenses of $6,163.00
A net balance of $11,337.00 to purchase a BLOCKED ACCOUNT-CD at the most favorable term and interest, to be rolled over to a new CD at maturity with US Bank, 201 Montgomery St., San Francisco until reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.
